text.title: lang-csharp-roslyn-analyzer-errors Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for lang-csharp-roslyn-analyzer-errors as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Setting TreatWarningsAsErrors=false in CI to "unblock" a flaky build instead of repairing the diagnostics.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Once warnings are not errors, every analyzer effectively becomes optional, and the next agent edit that triggers one slips through review.

failure-mode.description: "Fix" RS0017 (removed API) by deleting the corresponding line from PublicAPI.Shipped.txt.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Shipped means already released to consumers; removing the line hides the breaking change instead of recording it. The lift goes through *REMOVED* markers in PublicAPI.Unshipped.txt with explicit human review.
